---
title: "Setting up schedule monitor"
format: html
---

Hello

```{r}
library(Bucephala)
```

Packages required by the original script (hoping the namespace route avoids the need to call all individually)
```{r}
#library(chromote)
#library(rvest)
#library(xml2)
#library(dplyr)
#library(tidyr)
#library(ggplot2)
#library(lubridate)
#library(stringr)
```

```{r}
TodaysDate <- Sys.Date()
ParentURL <- "https://cibr.umaryland.edu/schedules"
InstrumentURL <- file.path(ParentURL, "512453#")
URLPath <- file.path(InstrumentURL, "schedule", "week7", TodaysDate)
```
